final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input load,
    input [63:0] load_value,
    output reg [63:0] count
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 64'b0;
        end else if (load) begin
            count <= load_value;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
